chunks.title: Call for Refuge in Zion
chunks.reason: Moab sends tribute and seeks counsel from Judah to escape destruction.

chunks.title: Lament Over Moab's Pride
chunks.reason: The prophet describes the fall of Moab's cities and their futile worship.

chunks.title: Prophecy of Moab's Decline
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle specifying the timeline for Moab's remaining glory.
